title: Chocolate Pudding
ingredients: ⅓ cup good quality cocoa powder
instructions: In a saucepan, combine 1½ cups milk, sugar, and cocoa powder.
Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat.
In a bowl, whisk remaining ½ cup milk, cornstarch, salt, egg yolks, and vanilla.
Gradually whisk hot milk into egg mixture.
Cook over medium-high heat, whisking constantly, until pudding boils and thickens, about 2–3 minutes.
Reduce heat and cook briefly until smooth.
Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight.
Before serving, whip cream to soft peaks and spoon on top.
Serve with a biscotti cookie on the side or dipped into the pudding.
notes: This recipe was inspired by Trio Restaurant.
Pudding can be made ahead and refrigerated for up to 24 hours before adding whipped cream topping.
Biscotti cookies pair well as a serving accompaniment.
